title: Shadow's Wacky Creatures
description: This mod adds around five silly little mobs into your Minecraft world. Most of the mobs are tameable so you can have a friend to take on your adventures.
body: This mod adds a few new mobs into your minecraft world. Most mobs are tameable while others just add to the scenery or slap you. A few of these mobs are biome specific or rare so keep a sharp eye around you to see potential friends. For the tameable mobs they only stay still with leads and some items used to tame them are: **Golden apples**, **Tropical fish**, and **Honeycombs**.
